messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return the exact required worker schema only; do not add keys.
Keep boundary_binding values concise. Keep final_answer 25-120 words. Keep arrays short.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:
{
  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May procurement issue the purchase order for a controlled solvent?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "No exact EHS execution release present",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN",
    "controlling_source_fact": "STD-NOV-042-P requires EHS execution release match before PO",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "Policy requires matching EHS release before PO issuance",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "Execution release remains unscheduled"
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "EHS-NOV-042",
    "STD-NOV-042-P"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "source doc exact match",
    "policy boundary rule"
  ],
  "final_answer": "The action boundary remains open. EHS-NOV-042 indicates the purchase execution release for NS-55 is unscheduled. STD-NOV-042-P mandates an exact EHS execution release match before PO issuance. SRC-NOV-042 limits activity to quote collection. Therefore, the purchase order cannot be issued. Escalate due to the unscheduled EHS release.",
  "open_blockers": [
    "EHS execution release unscheduled"
  ],
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "worker_role": "ADVERSARIAL_SCOPE_CHALLENGER"
}

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

action.description: May procurement issue the purchase order for a controlled solvent?

context.action_boundary: May procurement issue the purchase order for a controlled solvent?
context.anomaly_observed: An EHS note says the item may proceed for sourcing work, but execution authority may require a separate release.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Purchase order PO-NOV-042 buys 18 liters of NS-55 solvent for Facility R2.
Sourcing note SRC-NOV-042 says NS-55 may proceed for supplier quote collection only.
EHS note EHS-NOV-042 says NS-55 sourcing review is complete for Facility R2; purchase execution release remains to be scheduled.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Controlled-solvent purchase is complete only when EHS execution release matches chemical, quantity band, facility, and purchase order before PO issuance.
